footer.tagline: Rwanda's next-generation mobility platform for transport, food, courier and merchant intelligence.
footer.taglineShort: Fast deliveries in Kigali and nearby districts.

transport.title: Urumuri Transport
transport.description: Safe everyday rides with premium safety equipment and intelligent dispatch.

food.title: Urumuri Food
food.description: Restaurant and grocery delivery designed for fast, reliable urban living.

courier.title: Urumuri Courier
courier.description: Professional package delivery with secure handling and same-day options.

hero.headline: Moving Rwanda Forward.
hero.intro: Transportation. Food. Courier. Built around people, powered by intelligent logistics and premium experiences.

highlights.title: One platform for transport, food, courier and business intelligence.

glass.merchantText: Actionable analytics, inventory forecasting, revenue insights and demand signals for growing businesses.
glass.driversText: Flexible income, professional training and electric motorcycles for a safer, modern fleet.

features.title: Built on data, safety and seamless service.
features.dispatchText: Real-time routing ensures every ride and delivery moves faster and safer.
features.pricingText: Transparent pricing that considers distance, urgency, traffic and customer value.
features.merchantText: Tools designed to help businesses track performance, manage inventory and attract demand.
features.communityText: Discount programs for students and Umuganda participants support Rwanda's shared future.

cta.title: Rwanda's next transport ecosystem starts here.
cta.text: Technology, safety and premium service designed to move riders, businesses and packages with confidence.

hero.headline: Urumuri Transport
hero.intro: Every ride is designed for safety, rider comfort and modern city mobility. Our service is Rwanda's premium choice for everyday travel.
hero.media: Electric bikes with premium safety habits

safety.title: Visibility, comfort and electric power for every rider.
safety.helmetText: Every rider and passenger receives certified helmets for safer journeys across Kigali.
safety.rainText: Raincoats and protected seating keep passengers dry and secure in any weather.
safety.reflectiveText: High-visibility branding and reflective trims improve safety on evening rides.

glass.electricText: Our fleet is modern, efficient and built for lower emissions while keeping passengers comfortable.
glass.passengerText: Every trip is guided by seat comfort, clear communication and customer-focused service.

student.title: Supporting students with safer, more affordable access to campus.
student.discountText: Students access lower fares so they can travel reliably between campus, internships and home.
student.studyText: Focused on making transportation one less worry so students can dedicate time to learning.
student.youthText: Program support includes mentorship, work opportunities and community partnerships.

cta.title: Umuganda discounts for riders who help build Rwanda.
cta.text: Passengers participating in Umuganda are rewarded with discounted rides, making mobility part of Rwanda's shared growth.

hero.headline: Urumuri Food
hero.intro: Restaurant meals, groceries and daily essentials delivered with speed, safety and premium care.
hero.media: Fresh meals and groceries bringing convenience home.

services.title: Restaurant, grocery and buy-for-me delivery in one premium experience.
services.restaurantText: From local favorites to premium dining, your meal arrives warm, fast and carefully handled.
services.groceryText: Fresh produce, pantry staples and household essentials ready when you need them most.
services.buyText: Too busy to shop? Our team picks, buys and delivers items on your behalf with trusted accuracy.

glass.workText: Office meals and meetings stay on schedule with dependable delivery and live tracking.
glass.homeText: Groceries and essentials arrive safely so families can focus on the day ahead.

support.title: Built for busy lives, flexible schedules and modern urban demand.
support.fastText: Real-time order routing and trained couriers keep deliveries on time.
support.secureText: Careful packaging and safe delivery protect every order from pickup to doorstep.
support.smartText: Customer service and visibility keep every order in control from start to finish.

cta.title: Order meals, groceries and essentials with a premium delivery experience.
cta.text: Every request is handled by trained riders, from kitchen to customer.

hero.headline: Urumuri Courier
hero.intro: Professional package delivery for documents, business parcels and personal shipments with secure handling and same-day options.
hero.media: Protected packaging, trained riders and end-to-end visibility.

services.title: Document, business and personal deliveries executed with precision.
services.docText: Urgent papers delivered securely to offices, campuses and partners across Kigali.
services.businessText: Reliable handling for invoices, retail packages and B2B shipments.
services.personalText: Carefully managed handoffs for gifts, essentials and sensitive items.

glass.sameDayText: Choose premium speed for time-sensitive deliveries with guaranteed alignment from pickup to drop-off.
glass.trackingText: Real-time visibility helps you monitor progress, while secure packaging protects every item.

professional.title: Trained riders, secure processes and package protection at every step.
professional.protectionText: Designed for fragile items, valuable shipments and demanding business needs.
professional.trainingText: Courier teams receive service, safety and secure handling training before every route.
professional.workflowText: Order creation, picking, dispatch and delivery updates keep every shipment accountable.

cta.title: Move documents and packages with a courier service that feels modern, reliable and secure.

hero.headline: Urumuri Merchants
hero.intro: A premium dashboard for smart inventory, revenue tracking and AI-powered decisions tailored for growing businesses.
hero.media: Live metrics, demand forecasting and inventory alerts for your business.

dashboard.title: Modern sales analytics built for merchants and operators.

glass.revenueText: Monthly, weekly and daily graphs help you spot peaks, plan stock and optimise promotions.
glass.productText: Track top performing and slow moving products to improve inventory decisions.

intelligence.title: Insights that answer the questions every business needs.
intelligence.sellsText: Identify your highest performing dishes and restock with confidence.
intelligence.hireText: See peak demand windows and staffing opportunities in real time.
intelligence.restockText: Alerts for slowing items and suggested reorder levels keep shelves full.
intelligence.revenueText: Discover the menu and product combinations generating the greatest return.

future.title: Upcoming merchant advertising tools
future.text: Grow visibility inside the Urumuri ecosystem with targeted promotions for customers on route.

pricing.title: Fair and transparent pricing across transport and delivery services.
pricing.text: Transport pricing remains simple and predictable. Delivery fees may vary based on traffic, distance, time of day and urgency.
pricing.trafficText: Pricing follows real route conditions for better service value.
pricing.distanceText: Transparent fees that reflect the true journey required.
pricing.urgencyText: Customers choose the speed they need without surprise costs.

hero.headline: Join Urumuri
hero.intro: Earn flexible income while driving with modern equipment, safety training and support for growth.
hero.media: Electric vehicles and professional gear designed for modern drivers.

benefits.title: Flexible work, professional training and a safer fleet for every partner.
benefits.incomeText: Drive on your schedule, choose your routes and get rewarded for consistent service.
benefits.equipmentText: Premium helmets, reflective gear and electric motorcycles are provided for every driver.
benefits.trainingText: Structured onboarding ensures every rider is prepared for safe performance on the road.
benefits.growthText: Advance into mentor roles, fleet leadership and specialised delivery services.

glass.electricText: Ride modern vehicles with better efficiency, reliability and comfort for every trip.
glass.safetyText: Emergency response, insurance-ready procedures and rider-first safety systems.

cta.title: Build a professional driving career with Rwanda's next-generation mobility platform.

hero.headline: About Urumuri
hero.intro: We are Rwanda's intelligent mobility ecosystem, designed to move people, packages and businesses forward with safety and innovation.
hero.media: Innovation, safety and community at the core of every experience.

mission.missionText: To create Rwanda's leading mobility ecosystem that combines transportation, food delivery, courier services and merchant intelligence in one premium platform.
mission.visionText: To redefine urban movement across Africa through technology, safety and community-minded service.

values.title: Innovation, safety, community, integrity and sustainability guide every decision.
values.innovationText: We build smarter mobility with data-driven services and intelligent platform design.
values.safetyText: Passenger protection, rider training and secure delivery are never optional.
values.communityText: Discount programs, Umuganda support and youth empowerment help us grow together.
values.sustainabilityText: Electric motorcycles, efficient routing and responsible operations reduce our footprint.

impact.title: Building a future-ready transportation platform for urban communities.
impact.text: Urumuri invests in people, local businesses and safer streets through premium service and strategic partnerships.
impact.growthText: Supporting merchants and drivers with tools that grow businesses across Kigali.
impact.youthText: Programs for students and young drivers help build skills and economic opportunity.
impact.smartText: Data, analytics and automation keep the platform adaptive, stable and future ready.

hero.headline: Get in touch with Urumuri
hero.intro: Connect with our team for partnerships, support, driver applications and merchant services.
hero.media: Modern contact tools for business, drivers and customers.

reach.title: Business inquiries, support or driver applications...we're here to help.
reach.businessText: Partner with Urumuri for merchant services, advertising and logistics collaboration.
reach.driverText: Apply to join our fleet or ask about rider training and equipment.
reach.customerText: Get help with orders, deliveries and platform questions.
reach.pressText: Connect with Urumuri for announcements and media partnerships.

cta.title: Follow our journey as Rwanda's intelligent mobility ecosystem grows.

hero.headline: Urumuri Safety
hero.intro: From passengers to packages, safety is the foundation of every journey on the Urumuri network.
hero.media: Premium safety equipment, rider training and emergency support built in.

passenger.title: Premium helmets, reflective gear and emergency-ready support.
passenger.helmetText: High quality helmets are available to every rider and passenger on every trip.
passenger.reflectiveText: High-visibility gear improves awareness on busy city roads and at night.
passenger.visibilityText: Our electric bikes feature bold branding and lighting for safer travel in traffic.

glass.trainingText: Structured programs teach safe handling, customer care and route discipline for every driver.
glass.packageText: Secure packaging, protective seals and careful handoffs keep deliveries intact.

emergency.title: Support systems and future-ready insurance for every trip.
emergency.text: Emergency support, rider check-ins and insurance preparation are part of our long-term service plan.
emergency.supportText: Rapid response processes help keep riders and passengers safe on the road.
emergency.careText: Every courier item is handled with care from pickup to final handoff.
emergency.insuranceText: Future insurance integration ensures a safer platform for every customer.

cta.title: Safety is the promise that shapes every part of the Urumuri platform.

header.title: Leave a Review
header.subtitle: Help us improve your delivery experience by sharing your feedback

success.title: Thank you! 🎉
success.text: Your review has been submitted successfully. We appreciate your feedback!
